concepts.title: Compute optimal scaling (Chinchilla, LLaMA paper scaling laws)
concepts.hook: Optimal allocation of training compute between data and model size.

concepts.title: Loss scaling laws and extrapolation
concepts.hook: Predict loss at different scales; smooth relationships.

concepts.title: Downstream scaling laws
concepts.hook: How do improvements on pre-training loss translate to downstream tasks?

concepts.title: Scaling laws for long context
concepts.hook: Does efficiency/quality scale linearly or worse with context length?

concepts.title: In-context learning as emergence
concepts.hook: Sudden acquisition of ICL ability; why does it emerge?

concepts.title: Grokking phenomenon
concepts.hook: Long training before generalization; mechanism unclear.

concepts.title: Superposition and interpretability crisis
concepts.hook: Features in superposition; individual neurons not interpretable.
